texto: The job of the press is to speak truth to power. And yet, for doing our job, we are persecuted. I say that these aggressive and illegal tactics to silence us - inventing arbitrary legal interpretations, over-zealous charges and disproportionate sentences - must not be permitted to succeed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sara Harrison sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The job of the press is to speak truth to power. And yet, for doing our job, we are persecuted. I…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, verdade, power, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e power.
